title: ServiceOfferRelay v1
description: Wire envelope for one provider-signed `service-offer.v1` propagated across one offer-catalog relay boundary. The relay metadata is transport-facing; the embedded offer remains the accountable marketplace artifact.

relay/id.description: Stable relay-scoped identifier for this propagated offer.

relay/origin-node-id.description: Node that first emitted this relay envelope.

relay/hops.description: Relay hop count. Relays must drop envelopes whose hop count would exceed 3.

relay/do-not-forward.description: Advisory request asking downstream relays not to forward this envelope further.

relay/intended-node-id.description: Optional future-facing hint naming the Node that may relay the offer onward on the publisher's behalf.

relay/relayed-at.description: Timestamp of the most recent relay step.
